name: splitnaira-workspace
description: SplitNaira - Royalty splitting for Nigeria's creative economy

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../contracts && cargo build
scripts.dev: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:contracts
scripts.build:contracts: cd contracts && cargo build && cd .. && npm run generate:contract-interface && npm run generate:contract-types
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend && npm run test:contracts
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/build backend/dist && cd contracts && cargo clean
